Atty. KYLE MCLEAN, Esq. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP (Tel: 415-278-9400) appearing for defendant Xam Phuc Lu;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: INTERVENOR INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE WEST's Motion To File Complaint In Intervention.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the intervenor is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.
